svg.style: background: #0D111780; background-color: light-dark(#0D111780, #0D1117); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="bms-sm" name="BMS State Machine"> <mxGraphModel dx="1940" dy="907" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="850" background="light-dark(#0D111780,#0D1117)" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=14;fontColor=light-dark(#6e7681, #a8b3c2);align=left;" value="Managed by BMS_Trigger() in 100ms task | ERROR exit requires AND logic (SSR-022 + SSR-023)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="700" x="20" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="standby" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#58a6ff;fontColor=#c9d1d9;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="STANDBY

All contactors OPEN
Monitoring active
IVT current = 0 mA

Entry: SYS==RUNNING or ERROR recovery" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="270" x="50" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="precharge_s" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#d29922;fontColor=#c9d1d9;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="PRECHARGE

1. Close STRING- (SPS CH1)
2. Close PRECHARGE (SPS CH2)
3. Wait V_dc ≈ V_pack (±1000mV)
4. Close STRING+ (SPS CH0), open PRE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="350" x="500" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="normal" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#3fb950;fontColor=#c9d1d9;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="NORMAL

All 3 contactors CLOSED
Full power operation
SOA checks active every 10ms
IVT current = load current" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="350" x="500" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="error" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#f85149;fontColor=#c9d1d9;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="ERROR (Safe State)

All contactors OPEN (CONT_OpenAll)
State is LATCHED — no auto-recover

EXIT requires BOTH (AND logic):
SSR-022: Fault condition CLEARED
SSR-023: CAN 0x210 STANDBY request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="350" x="500" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_s_p" edge="1" parent="1" source="standby" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#3fb950;strokeWidth=3;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#3fb950;fontStyle=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="precharge_s" value="CAN 0x210 = NORMAL request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="-20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="460" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_p_n" edge="1" parent="1" source="precharge_s" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#3fb950;strokeWidth=3;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#3fb950;fontStyle=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="normal" value="Voltage match within threshold"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_p_e" edge="1" parent="1" source="precharge_s" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#f85149;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 3;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#f85149;exitX=1;exitY=1;entryX=1;entryY=0;" target="error" value="Timeout or 3 retries fail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0435" y="70" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="900" y="240" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="600" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_n_s" edge="1" parent="1" source="normal" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#58a6ff;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#58a6ff;fontStyle=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;" value="CAN 0x210 = STANDBY request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="190" y="425" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="190" y="221" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_n_e" edge="1" parent="1" source="normal" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#f85149;strokeWidth=3;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#f85149;fontStyle=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="error" value="ANY MSL violation (DIAG FATAL)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_e_s" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#58a6ff;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#58a6ff;entryX=0.321;entryY=1.01;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="standby" value="Fault cleared AND STANDBY requested (SSR-022 + SSR-023)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="500" y="700" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="701" /> <mxPoint x="137" y="701" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="460" y="700" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="132.07999999999993" y="229.99999999999997" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="faults" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#30363d;fontColor=#fca5a5;fontSize=13;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="Faults that trigger ERROR:

TSR-01: Cell OV > 2800mV (FTTI 750ms)
TSR-02: Cell UV < 1500mV (FTTI 750ms)
TSR-04/05: Overcurrent (FTTI 250ms)
TSR-06/07: Over/undertemp (FTTI 6050ms)
TSR-08: Contactor FB mismatch (350ms)
TSR-09: IVT comms loss (1250ms)
TSR-10: AFE comms loss (200ms)
TSR-13: Interlock break (250ms)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="280" x="990" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w_faults" edge="1" parent="1" source="faults" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#f85149;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=13;" target="error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="940" y="690" /> <mxPoint x="940" y="690" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#6e7681;fontColor=#c9d1d9;fontSize=15;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="UNINITIALIZED
Power-on reset" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="260" x="210" y="950" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;fontColor=#c4b5fd;fontSize=15;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="INITIALIZED
OS started, tasks created" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="260" x="210" y="1100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#3fb950;fontColor=#3fb950;fontSize=15;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="RUNNING
Normal operation — BMS SM active" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="270" x="210" y="1240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#f85149;fontColor=#f85149;fontSize=15;strokeWidth=3;align=center;" value="SYS ERROR
Terminal — requires MCU reset" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="215" y="1380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#8b5cf6;" target="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-2" value="HW init complete"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-6" edge="1" parent="1" source="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#8b5cf6;" target="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-3" value="All subsystems ready"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-7" edge="1" parent="1" source="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#f85149;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#f85149;" target="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-4" value="Fatal system error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#f85149;strokeWidth=0.5;fontColor=#9ca3af;fontSize=18;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="No recovery path.
SYS ERROR is terminal.
Only MCU reset (SBC watchdog)
can restart." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="330" x="560" y="1180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Zvs2Y6NIQx1uEkYGQ_RT-9" parent="1" <mxGeometry height="20" width="600" x="50" y="1580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WBZhySPWgRbXWCMWS487-2" parent="1" SOA detects
Counter: 0→1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="200" y="1650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WBZhySPWgRbXWCMWS487-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#d29922;fontColor=#d29922;fontSize=13;align=center;" value="Threshold accumulation

200ms delay" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="520" y="1650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WBZhySPWgRbXWCMWS487-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#f85149;fontColor=#fca5a5;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="+700ms
FATAL SET
BMS → ERROR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="670" y="1650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WBZhySPWgRbXWCMWS487-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#0d1117;strokeColor=#3fb950;fontColor=#3fb950;fontSize=13;align=center;" value="SPS cmd

parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="color: rgb(102, 255, 102);">Fault Reaction Timeline</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="-170" y="1670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: Managed by BMS_Trigger() in 100ms task | ERROR exit requires AND logic (SSR-022 + SSR-023)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 268px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c9d1d9;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c9d1d9; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STANDBY
All contactors OPEN
Monitoring active
IVT current = 0 mA
Entry: SYS==RUNNING or ERROR recovery

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 125px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c9d1d9;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c9d1d9; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
PRECHARGE
1. Close STRING- (SPS CH1)
2. Close PRECHARGE (SPS CH2)
3. Wait V_dc ≈ V_pack (±1000mV)
4. Close STRING+ (SPS CH0), open PRE

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 390px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c9d1d9;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c9d1d9; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
NORMAL
All 3 contactors CLOSED
Full power operation
SOA checks active every 10ms
IVT current = load current

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 655px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c9d1d9;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c9d1d9; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ERROR (Safe State)
All contactors OPEN (CONT_OpenAll)
State is LATCHED — no auto-recover
EXIT requires BOTH (AND logic):
SSR-022: Fault condition CLEARED
SSR-023: CAN 0x210 STANDBY request

g.text: Fault cleared AND STANDBY requested (SSR-022 + SSR-023)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 268px; height: 1px; padding-top: 665px; margin-left: 1172px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #fca5a5;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #fca5a5; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Faults that trigger ERROR:
TSR-01: Cell OV > 2800mV (FTTI 750ms)
TSR-02: Cell UV < 1500mV (FTTI 750ms)
TSR-04/05: Overcurrent (FTTI 250ms)
TSR-06/07: Over/undertemp (FTTI 6050ms)
TSR-08: Contactor FB mismatch (350ms)
TSR-09: IVT comms loss (1250ms)
TSR-10: AFE comms loss (200ms)
TSR-13: Interlock break (250ms)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 963px; margin-left: 381px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c9d1d9;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c9d1d9; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1103px; margin-left: 381px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c4b5fd;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #c4b5fd; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 268px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1243px; margin-left: 381px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #3fb950;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #3fb950; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RUNNING
Normal operation — BMS SM active

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1400px; margin-left: 386px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #f85149;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #f85149; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SYS ERROR
Terminal — requires MCU reset

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 320px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1230px; margin-left: 740px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #9ca3af;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #9ca3af; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
No recovery path.
SYS ERROR is terminal.
Only MCU reset (SBC watchdog)
can restart.
